---
title: "Research"
description: "Publications, working papers, and selected research projects."
---

My research examines how economic conditions and health-system design affect health, healthcare use, and financial protection. I focus especially on Indonesia and other low- and middle-income country settings.

## Themes

- **Socioeconomic inequality in health:** gradients in health outcomes and healthcare utilisation.
- **Healthcare access:** financial barriers, insurance coverage, stigma, and treatment gaps.
- **Healthcare financing:** public insurance, provider payment, and financial protection.
- **Policy evaluation:** applied empirical work on health-system reforms and public programs.

## Publications

{{< include _content/publications.md >}}

## Working Papers

{{< include _content/working-papers.md >}}

## Other Research Projects

{{< include _content/projects.md >}}
